Our Methodology

How Neuropian Finds You

Neuropian has built the algorithms to find those whose potential the world never measured correctly, and those already moving fast who need a team capable of keeping up. From across the globe, we scout the best and brightest.

01

EagleEyes

Neuropian’s browser extension. Install it once and every site you opt into becomes part of the intelligence sweep. The algorithm reads your behavioral signals in the background, building a cognitive profile that connects you to the opportunities and people you were built for.

Browser Extension
02

Falcon

Neuropian’s data sweeper. Falcon crawls the internet continuously, reading intellectual activity across forums, research threads, open-source contributions, competitive platforms, and niche communities. Where others see noise, Falcon reads signal, surfacing extraordinary minds from what they actually do online.

Data Sweep
03

Live Opportunities

Every day, Neuropian’s AI agent surfaces science and technology positions from across the internet, filtered for depth and matched to your cognitive profile. Not a job board. The roles that reward how you actually think.

Job Finder
04

Who’s the Next Elon?

Every era has its outliers. The ones who see what no one else sees, who build what no one thought to build. Most disappear not because they lacked ability, but because no one was looking. Neuropian has built something powerful enough to find them.

Neuropian Originals
05

RoundTable

Chat hubs, team systems, and project rooms for the world’s sharpest minds. The algorithms don’t just find extraordinary people, they find the right extraordinary people for each other. Shared obsessions. Complementary strengths.

Collective Intelligence
06

Our Mission

Every gifted program that closes is a tragedy. Every extraordinary mind that goes unrecognized is a loss the world will never calculate. Neuropian has built the system that education refused to build, one that finds the gifted, the divergent, the different, and gives them the stage they have always deserved.

Intellect Accelerator
Live Intelligence Feed
All internet users are recruitable. Neuropian's algorithms are parsing behavioral patterns across countless sessions, reading how people think, not just what they do. If you are reading this, you are not average. Neuropian does not reach average people.
Session analysis active · Reading time, scroll depth, and interaction patterns logged as cognitive indicators.
Neuropian Intelligence

EagleEyes, Neuropian’s Scouting Agent

EagleEyes is Neuropian’s browser extension. Install it once, and every site you opt into becomes part of the intelligence sweep. The algorithm reads your behavioral signals in the background, building a cognitive profile that Neuropian’s matching engine can act on, connecting you to the opportunities and people you were built for.

01

Silent Sweep

Runs quietly in your browser. No disruption. No data collection you didn’t consent to. Just the signal, read in real time.

02

You Choose the Sites

Opt each domain in yourself. Neuropian only reads the sites you explicitly allow, putting you in full control of your intelligence footprint.

03

Builds Your Profile

Every session adds to your cognitive fingerprint. The longer EagleEyes runs, the more precisely Neuropian can place you with the right opportunities and the right people.

04

Matched, Not Searched

When your profile reaches a threshold, Neuropian’s matching engine activates, surfacing you to the opportunities, teams, and organizations your cognitive signature was built for.

Chrome · Edge · Brave · Free

Collective Intelligence

RoundTable, Neuropian’s place and space for intellectual expansion

Chat hubs, team systems, and project rooms for the world’s sharpest minds. The algorithms don’t just find extraordinary people, they find the right extraordinary people for each other.

01

The Neuropian Chat System “RoundTable”

Conversations seeded by cognitive compatibility. Placed with people whose thinking complements yours, different enough to challenge you, similar enough to understand you.

02

Complementary Talent Matching

The algorithm finds people who complete you, not just people like you. A systems thinker paired with a creative visionary. A deep researcher with a relentless executor.

03

Shared Interest Discovery

Neuropian surfaces others who share the same obsessions. People you never would have found on LinkedIn. People who think about the same thing at 2am. The ones who get it without explanation.

04

Project Rooms

Every great project needs a workspace. Dedicated rooms for real collaboration, build, iterate, and ship with people who match your pace. The infrastructure for serious work, not just conversation.

05

Cash Prize Competitions

Real problems. Real stakes. Neuropian surfaces the world’s hardest unsolved challenges and rewards the minds that crack them, no pedigree required.

06

Intelligent Matching

Unlike any recruiting platform, Neuropian builds cognitive profiles across the entire behavioral internet and surfaces opportunities that fit how you actually think, not how you list yourself.

For Organizations

The world’s hardest problems, solved by the world’s sharpest minds

Post R&D challenges, engineering problems, and unsolved research questions directly into Neuropian’s problem rooms. Neuropian assembles a team from RoundTable, matched by cognitive profile to the challenge. This is not outsourcing. This is the most extraordinary minds on the problems that matter most.

R&D Challenges New Technology Development Engineering Problems Scientific Research Open-Domain Mysteries
“The most important collaborations in history didn’t happen because two people had the same skills. They happened because two people had the same problem, and opposite gifts. Neuropian has built the machine that finds those pairs.”
, Dylan Leitenberg, Founder & CEO
Live Opportunities

Real roles for extraordinary minds

Every day, Neuropian’s AI agent surfaces new science and technology positions from across the internet, filtered for depth, matched to your cognitive profile. Not a job board. The roles that reward how you actually think.

The Landscape

How Neuropian Deviates From The Norm

SeekOut, hireEZ, AmazingHiring, Fetcher, Noon AI, the world’s most powerful talent platforms were built for the neurotypical majority. Neuropian absorbs every technique they pioneered, combines them, and rebuilds from the ground up for the neurodivergent minds they systematically filtered out.

SeekOut · LinkedIn
Scans GitHub, research papers, and public profiles for credentials

Neuropian profiles how minds think, not what they list

SeekOut finds who has the right titles. Neuropian finds who has the cognitive architecture to solve problems nobody else can frame. We search behavior, pattern, and imagination, not biography.

Cognitive Profiling
hireEZ · Noon AI
Agentic AI outreach across LinkedIn, GitHub, Reddit, Slack

Neuropian tracks you across the entire behavioral internet

hireEZ searches platforms. Neuropian searches the entire behavioral internet, games, forums, creative communities, places where extraordinary people reveal themselves without trying to.

Full-Internet Sweep
AmazingHiring · Fetcher
Engineering talent from Stack Overflow, Kaggle, niche channels

Neuropian forges cross-domain teams no platform can conceive

AmazingHiring finds engineers. Neuropian finds the person who is also a poet, a game theorist, and a self-taught neuroscientist, then forges them with others whose strengths complete the equation.

Cross-Domain Intelligence
HireVue · Standard Boards
AI screening calibrated to neurotypical performance norms

Neuropian was built to find the ones every filter removes

Every filter on every job board eliminates another extraordinary mind. Neuropian was designed from first principles to identify what makes someone uniquely brilliant, breaking all stereotypes in thought.

Neurodivergent-First AI

Dylan Leitenberg · Founder & CEO · Neuropian

2028 · Season One Broadcast

The Founder
DL
Dylan Leitenberg
Founder & Visionary · Neuropian / Leitenberg Technologies
Data Science Robotics Psychology The Good Student Nonprofit YellowSwing Nonprofit

Dylan Leitenberg was gifted from an early age, and he knew it. He could feel the gap between what his mind was reaching for and what the classroom was able to offer. He could feel himself moving faster than the room. The questions he wanted to ask had no place in the curriculum. The problems he wanted to solve were not on the syllabus. He didn't build Neuropian because it was a good business idea. He built it because he lived the story himself, and watched it happen to everyone around him.

He wasn't disruptive. He wasn't difficult. He was simply further ahead than the system was designed to accommodate, and the system, rather than stretching to meet him, quietly asked him to shrink.

He watched teachers assign grades to curiosity. He watched the bell cut off trains of thought that could have led somewhere remarkable. He watched peers, some of the most gifted people he would ever know, gradually stop raising their hands, stop asking why, stop believing their particular kind of intelligence had a place in the world.

Dylan refused to become manageable. His work with The Good Student, a Pasadena-based nonprofit dedicated to student wellbeing, gave him the scientific and human vocabulary for what he had always understood: that a student's wellbeing is inseparable from their motivation and drive. That insight became the foundation of Neuropian.

"From an early age, I realized that many of those who have the greatest potential get discouraged and thrown aside by the education system. The limits put onto them by their teachers hinder their success and drive. Standardized testing disregards those whose intellects fall outside the norm. We embrace the evolution of education as it expands through every potential elevation. Living in a world with no limits, that is what Neuropian has built."

— Dylan Leitenberg, Founder & CEO
The Academy · Founded by Dylan Leitenberg

Leitenberg Academy

A school being built for the minds the system was never designed to hold.

Leitenberg Academy

Est. Soon · By Neuropian · Identifying the brightest from the youngest ages possible

Why the Academy Exists

The education system has failed those who think differently. Gifted programs have been abandoned one by one. The brightest children in the country are being processed through a system built for the statistical middle. They are not failing. The system is failing them.

Leitenberg Academy was created to end that. Our AI identifies extraordinary minds early, earlier than any institution thought to look, and provides them with an education that can actually match who they are.

What Makes It Different

No gifted program cuts. No arbitrary grade levels. No standardized tests that penalize original thinking. Students are identified young, trained continuously, and connected to opportunities the moment they are ready, not when an institution decides they are old enough.

We embrace the evolution of education as it expands through every potential elevation. Living in a world with no limits, this is what Leitenberg Academy teaches from the very first day.

We all know stories of those who missed their chance to unleash their untapped potential. No longer will we hear the phrase: "you can't do that."
, Dylan Leitenberg
The Story That Started It All

The Genius
Among Us

In high school, Dylan realized that he and the students he met thought differently. Many had brilliant minds and could comprehend things like five-dimensional Rubik’s cubes and rocket engines, students who had far surpassed their teachers, looking to reach the next level.

Yet these students spent their days in classrooms that couldn’t provide an adequate education for such minds. With their vast knowledge and skillsets, they could have been working for Apple, Microsoft, or running their own companies.

Schools have abandoned their gifted programs, causing those who think differently to lose their creativity and drive. Without sufficient support, these students struggled, when they could have been changing the world.

These kids are not outliers. They are one of thousands, extraordinary people, living ordinary lives, destined for greatness. They are not the problem. The system is.

5D
Rubik’s Cube
“Students who had far surpassed their teachers, looking to reach the next level.”
Schools Have Abandoned the Minds That Needed Them Most

Schools Have Abandoned the Minds
That Needed Them Most

In the past two decades, gifted education programs have been systematically defunded and eliminated. A generation of extraordinary minds left wandering, bored, overlooked, misdiagnosed, medicated into submission. This education system destroys the genuine and constructs a homogenized society with no room for ingenuity.

6M+ gifted students underserved in the US annually
3x more likely to drop out without adequate challenge
72% of US states have cut gifted programs since 2010

Boredom Becomes Failure

When a mind operates years ahead and receives material years behind, it disengages, labeled difficult, disruptive. The limits put onto them hinder their success and drive. The label is always wrong. The system is the problem.

The Misdiagnosis Epidemic

Gifted children who are unchallenged exhibit behaviors identical to ADHD and anxiety. Thousands are medicated annually for symptoms that would vanish if the curriculum simply matched their minds. We are sedating our most extraordinary people.

Standardized to Extinction

Standardized testing disregards those whose intellects fall outside the norm. Every genuinely original mind is scored as deficient, tracked downward. No longer will we hear: "No, you can't do that." That era ends here.

◆ The Promise ◆
The Neuropian Promise
Every gifted program that closes is a tragedy. Every extraordinary mind that goes unrecognized is a loss the world will never calculate. Neuropian has built the system that education refused to build, one that finds the gifted, the divergent, the different, and gives them the stage they have always deserved.

Neuropian Intelligence

EagleEyes

The Neuropian browser extension. Opt any site into Neuropian’s intelligence sweep and let the algorithm find you.

⬇ Download EagleEyes  (.zip)
Chrome · Edge · Brave  ·  Free
How to Install
1

Download

Click the button above to download the extension as a .zip file. Your browser will save it to your Downloads folder.

2

Unzip

Find the downloaded file and unzip it. On Mac, double-click it. On Windows, right-click → “Extract All.” You’ll get a folder called talent-scout-extension-2.

3

Open Chrome Extensions

In Chrome, Edge, or Brave, type this into your address bar and press Enter:

chrome://extensions
4

Enable Developer Mode

In the top-right corner of the Extensions page, toggle Developer mode on. This lets you install extensions that aren’t from the Chrome Web Store.

5

Load the Extension

Click Load unpacked, then select the talent-scout-extension-2 folder you unzipped in Step 2.

6

Pin It

Click the puzzle piece 🧩 icon in your Chrome toolbar, find EagleEyes, and click the pin icon so it stays visible.

✦

Done

Click the ✦ EagleEyes icon in your toolbar to enable it and opt your first site into Neuropian’s intelligence sweep.
